rag_rules: When AGREE reports 'named thing must be an expression with a type', trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper on the same line and fix the root cause.
If a binary expression '=>' has a left side of type '<error>', ensure the left side is a valid boolean expression using only visible features or declared helpers.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, avoid using implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
Ensure all expressions in guarantees are type-correct and reference only visible identifiers or declared helpers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead, resolve the root cause of the invalid reference.
irrelevant_topics: Assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes
